description: A text input component with size variants and error state.

type.description: HTML input type (text, email, password, number, etc.)

change.description: Fired on input, detail contains { value }

value.description: Get or set the current value

handled: The inner <input> inherits placeholder, value, type, and disabled state

required.when: input has no visible <label> associated by for/id
required.requirement: Provide aria-label on aihio-input, or wrap in a <label>. Placeholder is not a label.
Describe the error via aria-describedby pointing to a visible message; the red border alone is not conveyed to screen readers.

counterExamples.reason: Placeholder is not a label. Associate a <label> or add aria-label.
error=true without an aria-describedby message leaves screen reader users without context.

examples: Password is too short.
